layouts.strategy: The Bento Grid Protocol (High Density Grid for Dashboards)
layouts.spacing: Generous scaling: p-4, p-6, p-8 for containers. Tight gaps for data tables and dense info.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content and forms.
layouts.surfaces: GRID BORDERS (The 'Technical' Look). Expose the skeleton. border-collapse style layout, sharp edges, max 4px radius.

components.navigation: Navbar + Sidebar layout. Sidebar fixed left, Navbar fixed top z-50. Use Solid Background with a hard bottom/right border.
components.table: Shadcn Table customized. Sharp edges, 1px subtle borders (border-border), no shadow. Left-aligned text.
components.badges: Status badges must use high-contrast. Success (Green), Warning (Yellow), Danger (Red) — map to each entity's own states. Flat solid background with 1px border matching text tint.
components.dialog: Shadcn Dialog for entity creation forms. Solid background, sharp corners, harsh shadows (Neo-brutalist touch).
components.forms: Shadcn Input, Select. Never use native html inputs. Radius 0 or max 4px.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no soft shadows. Sharp and technical.

states.loading: Use minimalist skeleton loaders or ASCII-style technical loaders. No generic spinners.
states.empty: Generous negative space. Large text telling a story (e.g., 'No items yet. The grid is empty.'), not just 'No data'.
states.error: High contrast Signal Red text/border. Brutal honesty in copy.
states.success: Micro-interaction success state. Sonner toast with acid green accent flash.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all interactive elements (lift -translate-y-1, subtle shadow, border color darkens).
motion.transitions: Use specific properties (e.g., transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease). NO 'transition: all'.

accessibility.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for body, 3:1 for large text. Ensure APCA compliance.
accessibility.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='create-item-btn').

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 0.02) to kill digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (@phosphor-icons/react) for dense developer/admin tools.

media.images: No images required per problem statement (dashboard UI). Rely on typography, grid structures, and sharp color accents for visual hierarchy.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the design guidelines provided in this JSON.
Implement light and dark theme using Tailwind config and custom CSS.
Install and use '@phosphor-icons/react' for all icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react).
Do NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; } is BANNED).
Use Shadcn UI components but override their styles to match the Archetype 4 rules (sharp edges, high contrast, 1px borders).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 for icons.
Use modern button styles (sharp/rectangular) with specific interaction animations.
Do not apply universal transition (`transition: all`). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
Examine existing components to understand the project's component patterns before creating new ones.
All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover states with text color defined (e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
